title: Classes & Instances Project
tagline: Build a mini application using Classes & Instances
description: Create a working Python application demonstrating Classes & Instances.
starterCode:
# Python implementation for Classes & Instances
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solution:
# Python implementation for Classes & Instances
def process_data(records):
    """Process input dataset cleanly."""
    results = [item.strip().upper() for item in records if item]
    return results

if __name__ == '__main__':
    data = ['apple', 'banana', 'cherry']
    print('Processed:', process_data(data))
solutionExpl: This solution demonstrates clean application of Classes & Instances in Python.
